auth.forbidden_role: This account cannot access the admin panel.
auth.email_not_allowed: This email is not allowed to sign in.

payments.paypal_not_configured: PayPal credentials (client id / secret) are not fully configured.
payments.paypal_oauth_failed: Could not retrieve PayPal access token — check sandbox/live and credentials.
payments.paypal_api_error: PayPal rejected the request — please retry or contact support.
payments.session_url_missing: PayPal did not return a checkout link — order configuration may be invalid.
payments.paypal_order_not_approvable: PayPal order is not approved yet or has expired.
payments.paypal_order_missing_custom_id: Missing application id (custom_id) on the PayPal order.
payments.paypal_capture_incomplete: Capture response is incomplete — cannot confirm payment.
payments.paypal_webhook_not_configured: PayPal webhook id is not configured.
payments.application_not_payable: Draft not found or expired — payment cannot be started.
payments.draft_not_found: Application draft not found or has expired.

paypal_order_id.invalid: Invalid PayPal order id or token field.

applications.retry_payment_not_allowed: Retry payment is not allowed — draft not found or expired.
applications.status_transition_invalid: This status transition is not allowed.
applications.nationality_not_eligible_evisa: Nationality is not eligible for e-visa.

chat.session_not_found: Chat session does not exist or has expired.
chat.gemini_not_configured: AI assistant is not enabled — missing GEMINI_API_KEY.
chat.rate_limited: You are sending messages too quickly — please wait a moment.
chat.ai_failed: Could not get a reply from the AI assistant — please try again.
chat.translate_failed: Translation failed — please try again later.

errors.post_not_found: Post not found or not published.
errors.exemption_not_found: No nationality / exemption data for this country code.
errors.application_code_generation_failed: Could not generate application code — please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You must sign in to continue.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.

country_code.length: Country code must be ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

session_id.short: session_id must be at least 8 characters.

user_name.max: Display name must not exceed 120 characters.

text.max: Translation text must not exceed 5000 characters.
